title: Crispy Norwegian Salmon Wrap
description: A simple and flavorful wrap filled with crispy Norwegian salmon, lettuce, and tangy aioli. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Romaine or iceberg lettuce work well

ingredients.name: Crispy bacon
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds a nice crunch

ingredients.name: Dill weed
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried dill work well

instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the salmon fillets with salt, pepper, and dill weed.
3. Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, cook the crispy bacon in a separate skillet until crispy.
5. Assemble the wrap by spreading mayonnaise on the wrap, followed by a slice of salmon, crispy bacon, lettuce, and a sprinkle of dill weed.
